title: Network access to cardholder systems must be restricted to required services only.
description: Network access to cardholder systems must be restricted to required services only. Infra: Security groups must restrict inbound/outbound traffic by port and CIDR..
fix: Security groups must restrict inbound/outbound traffic by port and CIDR.

title: Public-facing systems must be isolated from internal cardholder systems.
description: Public-facing systems must be isolated from internal cardholder systems. Infra: ALB must not directly route traffic to DB/private subnets..
fix: ALB must not directly route traffic to DB/private subnets.

title: PAN must be protected with strong cryptography wherever stored.
description: PAN must be protected with strong cryptography wherever stored. Infra: Storage systems must enforce encryption at rest..
fix: Storage systems must enforce encryption at rest.

title: Encryption keys must be securely managed.
description: Encryption keys must be securely managed. Infra: KMS must enforce rotation and strict IAM access..
fix: KMS must enforce rotation and strict IAM access.

title: Cardholder data must be transmitted securely.
description: Cardholder data must be transmitted securely. Infra: APIs and load balancers must enforce HTTPS only..
fix: APIs and load balancers must enforce HTTPS only.

title: Vulnerabilities must be identified and addressed promptly.
description: Vulnerabilities must be identified and addressed promptly. Infra: CI must fail on critical CVEs in dependencies..
fix: CI must fail on critical CVEs in dependencies.

title: Secure coding practices must be enforced for changes.
description: Secure coding practices must be enforced for changes. Infra: CI must include security checks before merge..
fix: CI must include security checks before merge.

title: Access must follow least privilege principles.
description: Access must follow least privilege principles. Infra: IAM policies must not allow wildcard actions..
fix: IAM policies must not allow wildcard actions.

title: MFA must be enforced for admin access.
description: MFA must be enforced for admin access. Infra: IAM users must enable MFA..
fix: IAM users must enable MFA.

title: Passwords must meet complexity and protection requirements.
description: Passwords must meet complexity and protection requirements. Infra: Secrets must not be hardcoded in codebase..
fix: Secrets must not be hardcoded in codebase.

title: Access to cardholder data must be logged.
description: Access to cardholder data must be logged. Infra: DB/API logs must be enabled..
fix: DB/API logs must be enabled.

title: Logs must be protected against tampering.
description: Logs must be protected against tampering. Infra: Logs must be centralized and immutable..
fix: Logs must be centralized and immutable.

title: External vulnerability scans must be performed periodically.
description: External vulnerability scans must be performed periodically. Infra: Public endpoints must undergo automated scanning..
fix: Public endpoints must undergo automated scanning.

title: PAN must be masked when displayed.
description: PAN must be masked when displayed. Infra: Logs/UI must not expose PAN..
fix: Logs/UI must not expose PAN.

title: Security responsibilities must be clearly assigned.
description: Security responsibilities must be clearly assigned. Infra: IAM roles must not be shared or overly broad..
fix: IAM roles must not be shared or overly broad.

title: Personal data must be protected with reasonable safeguards.
description: Personal data must be protected with reasonable safeguards. Infra: PII storage must enforce encryption + IAM restrictions..
fix: PII storage must enforce encryption + IAM restrictions.

title: Systems must log personal data processing activities.
description: Systems must log personal data processing activities. Infra: Monitoring/logging must be enabled..
fix: Monitoring/logging must be enabled.

title: Personal data must support deletion controls.
description: Personal data must support deletion controls. Infra: Storage must enforce lifecycle deletion..
fix: Storage must enforce lifecycle deletion.

title: Systems must ensure availability via backups.
description: Systems must ensure availability via backups. Infra: Backup policies must be configured..
fix: Backup policies must be configured.

title: Access must be restricted to authorized roles.
description: Access must be restricted to authorized roles. Infra: IAM must restrict PII access..
fix: IAM must restrict PII access.

title: Breaches must be detected and reported.
description: Breaches must be detected and reported. Infra: Alerts must trigger on suspicious activity..
fix: Alerts must trigger on suspicious activity.

title: Processing must follow valid consent controls.
description: Processing must follow valid consent controls. Infra: APIs must enforce authentication/validation..
fix: APIs must enforce authentication/validation.

title: Cross-border transfers must be secured.
description: Cross-border transfers must be secured. Infra: Transfers must use TLS encryption..
fix: Transfers must use TLS encryption.

title: Children�s data must be strictly protected.
description: Children�s data must be strictly protected. Infra: Strong access restrictions required..
fix: Strong access restrictions required.

title: Personal data must not be exposed in logs or telemetry.
description: Personal data must not be exposed in logs or telemetry. Infra: Logs must mask sensitive identifiers (Aadhaar/PAN)..
fix: Logs must mask sensitive identifiers (Aadhaar/PAN).

title: Card credentials must not be stored post authorization.
description: Card credentials must not be stored post authorization. Infra: No PAN/CVV stored in DB..
fix: No PAN/CVV stored in DB.

title: Tokenization must protect sensitive payment data.
description: Tokenization must protect sensitive payment data. Infra: Systems must use tokens not raw PAN..
fix: Systems must use tokens not raw PAN.

title: Logs must capture payment processing events.
description: Logs must capture payment processing events. Infra: Payment APIs must log activity..
fix: Payment APIs must log activity.

title: Stored payment data must be encrypted.
description: Stored payment data must be encrypted. Infra: Storage must enforce encryption..
fix: Storage must enforce encryption.

title: Secure storage norms must be enforced.
description: Secure storage norms must be enforced. Infra: DB must enforce access restrictions..
fix: DB must enforce access restrictions.

title: Logs must be securely retained.
description: Logs must be securely retained. Infra: Central logging required..
fix: Central logging required.

title: Payment data retention must be limited.
description: Payment data retention must be limited. Infra: Lifecycle rules required..
fix: Lifecycle rules required.

title: Investor and trading data must be encrypted at rest using strong cryptography.
description: Investor and trading data must be encrypted at rest using strong cryptography. Infra: Databases and storage handling investor data must enforce encryption at rest using managed keys..
fix: Databases and storage handling investor data must enforce encryption at rest using managed keys.

title: Investor and trading data must be encrypted in transit across all systems.
description: Investor and trading data must be encrypted in transit across all systems. Infra: APIs, load balancers, and internal services must enforce TLS-only communication..
fix: APIs, load balancers, and internal services must enforce TLS-only communication.

title: Critical trading infrastructure must be isolated from public networks.
description: Critical trading infrastructure must be isolated from public networks. Infra: Trading systems must reside in private subnets with restricted SG rules..
fix: Trading systems must reside in private subnets with restricted SG rules.

title: Privileged access to trading infrastructure must enforce MFA and least privilege.
description: Privileged access to trading infrastructure must enforce MFA and least privilege. Infra: IAM admin roles must require MFA and restrict permissions..
fix: IAM admin roles must require MFA and restrict permissions.

title: Logs from critical systems must be centrally collected and monitored.
description: Logs from critical systems must be centrally collected and monitored. Infra: Logs must be forwarded to centralized logging or SIEM systems..
fix: Logs must be forwarded to centralized logging or SIEM systems.

title: Suspicious or unauthorized activities must trigger immediate alerts.
description: Suspicious or unauthorized activities must trigger immediate alerts. Infra: Alert rules must exist for failed login attempts and anomalies..
fix: Alert rules must exist for failed login attempts and anomalies.

title: Critical systems must undergo continuous vulnerability monitoring.
description: Critical systems must undergo continuous vulnerability monitoring. Infra: CI/CD must enforce automated vulnerability scanning..
fix: CI/CD must enforce automated vulnerability scanning.

title: Production trading environments must be segregated from non-production environments.
description: Production trading environments must be segregated from non-production environments. Infra: Dev/staging/prod must use isolated infrastructure..
fix: Dev/staging/prod must use isolated infrastructure.
